---
agent: agent
description: Analyzes all context to predict if tests will pass.
---

Figure out what ticket and context the user wants to analyze.

Review the requirements, the change summary, the change detail, and the test cases. Then analyze the application code to evaluate and predict if the test cases will pass. Also raise any red flags if there is potential for other bugs.

Create a new markdown file with a table with columns for the test case, the expected result, the predicted result, and any issues.

You may also include a section for any important test recommendations.
